title: Transform Your Vehicle with Shine My Ride's Exterior Wash & Wax, up to 50% off Detailing Services

structured_fields.label: WHAT'S INCLUDED
value: Full detail including buffing, interior full shampoo and deep clean or spray sealant
Interior and exterior detailing options available

highlights_html: Get a Full Detail including buffing, interior full shampoo and deep clean or a spray sealant.
highlights_text: Get a Full Detail including buffing, interior full shampoo and deep clean or a spray sealant.
about_deal_html:
Ever thought about how nice it would be to have a spotless car without lifting a finger? This deal lets you enjoy up to $100 toward detailing services at Shine My Ride. It's perfect for those who want their cars looking fresh inside and out. Just remember to mention your Groupon when booking!

What we offer

$100 voucher offers access to diverse detailing packages suited for different needs. Options range from basic cleaning to comprehensive care, ensuring customers get just what they need. Tailored services include both interior and exterior options.

  • $100 Voucher Toward Detailing Services: Use this voucher for various detailing services available at the shop

Why you should grab the offer

Shine My Ride's exceptional service comes from their unique ceramic coating expertise using renowned Duraslic products, promising a finish that lasts longer than ordinary treatments. With both mobile and in-store options available, they offer flexibility that suits any schedule or location preference. Their comprehensive packages ensure each customer receives personalized care, making sure no detail is overlooked. Customers rave about their award-winning service which has created lasting impressions and encouraged repeat visits. With the additional benefit of a lifetime warranty on window tinting, this offer provides peace of mind knowing quality is guaranteed over time. For those looking for unmatched vehicle care and outstanding customer interaction, this deal is not one to miss.

fine_print: Limit 1 per person(s), may buy 1 additional as gift(s).
Merchant's standard cancellation policy applies (any fees not to exceed Groupon price).
All goods or services must be used by the same person.

review_quotes.text: The owner was very professional. He explained the service and he pointed out some other areas that needed attention. Car Shine did an excellent job on my car. Highly recommend.
review_quotes.author: Berlynn

review_quotes.text: Smooth transition from appointment to completion  Wonderful customer service.  Outstanding Services.
review_quotes.author: Lorraine

review_quotes.text: This was my first time going to Shine My Ride and I am totally impressed with the overall service I received. They made my Moms older ride look new again. I will be going back and I highly recommend this establishment.
review_quotes.author: Jacqueline

review_quotes.text: My car was almost new! Great detailing. Highly recommend the executive cleaning if you haven’t deep cleaned your vehi
review_quotes.author: Cathleen

review_quotes.text: Great job, very professional. So happy I went thru with it, plus also really happy I could have them come to me during the pandemic.
review_quotes.author: lee
